{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221904557D1A5FAF711D31DD81D1"}"},"total":13},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7619135764176061208","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写到常规赛开打就没看到贾米森和修斯，也没看到交易啊！贾米森是全明星，休斯是一防，作者给写没了？丹皮尔还有点戏份。贾米森和休斯是直接看不到了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773974498,"group_id":"7608578283948493886","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+XqHbQoZBiSw5V4pSVbYj0=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702450&x-signature=Ei72J6rSbnhecWr1N7y3lf3qNeE%3D","user_id":"4258315628","user_name":"乚叶知秋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4258315628","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608578283948493886","book_info":{"abstract":"2001年，那是NBA最好的时代。
洛杉矶，OK组合的王朝正在升起，科比和奥尼尔的眼睛里只有奥布莱恩杯。
圣安东尼奥，双塔沉默地伫立，邓肯的面瘫底下藏着冠军的野心。
费城，艾弗森扛着一身伤病杀进总决赛，那个瘦小的身影让全世界动容。
还有华盛顿，乔丹以老板的身份坐在选秀台下，看着台上一个个年轻人走过。
而林星，一个18岁的中国少年，刚刚拿下NCAA总冠军，刚刚加冕MOP，刚刚成为状元最大热门。
他要走进这个众星云集的年代。
站在科比面前，站在奥尼尔面前，站在邓肯面前，站在加内特面前。
从他们手里，抢走本该属于他们的东西。
这是最好的时代，群星璀璨。
而他，要来当那颗最亮的星。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7f684f4d34b965cb35c67c1de2b5eaa2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"喜欢椰蟹的姜倩","author_id":"","book_id":"7608578283948493886","book_name":"NBA：开局字母哥模板打爆全联","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c89048","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":453,"name":"开局","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=453&name=开局&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7608578287178105406","read_count":"35759","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"169978"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"55","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,穿越,开局","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o7f684f4d34b965cb35c67c1de2b5eaa2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361495&x-signature=fV973MqkDjRTP6MVZOJWunS8FKM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3556233483139332","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"125"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603221904557D1A5FAF711D31DD81D1"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":8549,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16204,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":23},"user_action":{"author":0
